items.title: GRIZZLIES ACQUIRE ISAIAH STEWART, AJ JOHNSON, D’ANGELO RUSSELL, CONDITIONAL FIRST ROUND PICK, THREE SECOND ROUND PICKS AND SECOND ROUND PICK SWAP IN SIX-TEAM TRADE

items.title: Grizzlies will have 19 players under contract if Post offer sheet isn't matched. I presume non-guaranteed Taj Gibson gets waived, but who are the other three cuts? Maybe KCP buyout, AJ Johnson, and one of Murray or Hendricks?

items.title: Memphis Grizzlies after trading Santi Aldama for AJ Johnson and picks.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Memphis Grizzlies after trading Santi Aldama for AJ Johnson and picks.

They will create a $17 million trade exception by absorbing AJ Johnson into their small Ja Morant trade exception.

They have that and the $29 million trade exception for taking on more money.

items.title: Mavericks reportedly land Santi Aldama in deal with Grizzlies for AJ Johnson
items.author: Yahoo Sports

items.title: The Memphis Grizzlies are trading Santi Aldama to the Dallas Mavericks for AJ Johnson, a protected 2030 Warriors first-round pick and two future second-round picks, sources tell ESPN.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: The Memphis Grizzlies are trading Santi Aldama to the Dallas Mavericks for AJ Johnson, a protected 2030 Warriors first-round pick and two future second-round picks, sources tell ESPN.
